studies.title: Evaluation of the Impact of mebix in Patients with Type II Diabetes mellitus in daily practice

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'mebix', as evidenced by its repeated mention in the title, trial description, and intervention group description.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, multicentre, open-controlled observational study with an intraindividual control group, which aligns with real-world evidence (RWE) as it is observational and not randomized.
